steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes say musicians prize Stradivarius violins for their sound quality. The student wants to emphasize why musicians value these instruments.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Many Stradivarius violins, like the Clara Bennett, get their name from a former owner.: discusses the naming convention for Stradivarius violins rather than why musicians prize them. ✗
  • Choice B — Among musicians, violins made by Antonio Stradivari are renowned for their sound quality.: directly states the reason musicians value the violins, matching the note exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — Antonio Stradivari, a famous violin maker, lived from 1644 to 1737.: provides biographical information about Stradivari rather than explaining why the violins are prized. ✗
  • Choice D — Clara Bennett was an American violinist who once owned a Stradivarius violin.: also focuses on biographical details and does not address why musicians value the violins. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
